raw_consumer_statement:
My Barclays AA Mastercard information was stolen while at the XXXX XXXX traveling from XXXX back to Texas and was used by some criminal without my Card! my info was used later at several vendors in another state, ( Massachusetts ) & at airports and restaurants, and for merchandise purchases. 
I have been disputing these charges with Barclays for 2 months now, I was told it was taken care of only to find the charges remaining on my monthly bill and being charged interest for them! Barclays case # XXXX The irony is XXXX smaller fraud amounts were also reported and they immediately removed those! XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX {$14.00} & {$9.00}! I have been told I am not responsible for these charges in writing yet the amounts remain on my statement and are reflected in my balance. 
I pay my total bill every month and never carry a balance so I keep seeing a balance! 
these XXXX fraud charges within the same state and location are still on my account! 
I have called on five occasions, and told the pending case is ongoing and then told it was removed & not taken care of. I have closed and reopened new cards and they keep forwarding the frauds! 
I have documentation of the date and person I spoke to at Barclays. I have now emailed several times as well. 
The remaining fraud charges : XXXX  XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XX/XX/year> {$110.00} XXXX XXXX XXXX. XX/XX/year> {$17.00} XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  XX/XX/year>. {$390.00} XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XX/XX/year>. {$17.00} How do they charge without physical my card?
